channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: End of Selby Road, 14th May
item.description:
Crushed car parked on a public road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti o/s 62 Parkhill Road, Bexley, 14th May
item.description:
Offensive graffiti o/s 62 Parkhill Road, Bexley - on green utility box
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkhill Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 14th May
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I would like to urgently report a blocked drain outside Rutland House on Hawthorn Grove (see the attached photo). The drain is located beside the disabled parking bay, which is in constant use, and there is now a very strong and unpleasant smell coming from the area. This situation is causing a serious safety and health hazard, particularly for vulnerable disabled residents and visitors, including people with visual impairments who regularly use this area, as well as other road and pavement users passing through daily. The condition of the drain and surrounding area urgently needs to be inspected and resolved as soon as possible. Please treat this matter as urgent and arrange for the blockage to be dealt with immediately. Thank you 🙏

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartfield Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left after bin collection, 14th May
item.description:
Litter left after bin collection Thurs 14th May.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves and other debris blocking gutters and drain, 14th May
item.description:
The section of road between 58 Aldeburgh St and 23 Fearon was not cleared of autumn leaves by the council and now there is even more debris from the trees and rubbish blocking the gutters. This section of the street does not appear to have been swept or cleaned for a long time and looks very neglected and messy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horn Lane, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sudden downpour drains blocked, 14th May
item.description:
The ruders flooded completely as the photos show

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big potholes on Brecknock road outside Willbury flats Hilldrop Estate, 14th May
item.description:
Road has many deep potholes for over 6 months now, along Islington side & Camden side going all along Brecknock road which can cause damage to cars & dangerous for those on bikes. Please come to investigate. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Brecknock Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 Lime bikes dumped alongside 58 Aldeburgh Street, 14th May
item.description:
Lime bikes have been left here for several days. They are blocking the pavement and are unsightly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire bathroom dumped in Ravensbourne Mansions bin shed, 14th May
item.description:
Been there for ~2 weeks - bathtub, toilets and vanity Refuse collectors won’t take it and bins haven’t been emptied as a result (inaccessible due to bathtub)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berthon Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins on pavement for Months !, 14th May
item.description:
As previously reported these bins have been on the pavement for months. Driveway Work ceased junk all over the place. Directly have to push the bins to get Past this is selfish behaviour causing the Street to look derelict.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Maiden Erlegh Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding outside school entrance, 14th May
item.description:
There are numerous large puddles outside the school entrance and the kids and adults can’t get to the school without going through them which them means soaking wet shoes to try and dry for the next day. It also limits the standing space for adults when waiting to collect children.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wrotham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded lime bikes parked dangerously and Blocked, 14th May
item.description:
Report overcrowded lime bikes parked dangerously and Blocked off the pavement. Outside Cafe Concerto on Haymarket .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35,35a, Haymarket, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor Road Condition, 14th May
item.description:
The corner of Bognor and Brixham Road, road surfaces are detoriating and holes are starting to form
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bognor Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazard: Water pavement cover missing, 14th May
item.description:
Water cover has been missing for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King Street, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Awful Road Surface still not fixed, 14th May
item.description:
The road surface on the junction between Normanhurst Avenue, Brixham Road & Swanley road is still Awful. I received an email on 13th May saying they were fixed Report ref: 9012279 which is absolutely not the case. Nothing has been done, there are blue markers indicating that they may be? It is a very used mini junction that needs real long term repair. I look forward to hearing from you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area floods every single time outside st michaels school, 14th May
item.description:
Ground is so uneven they whole area consists of massive puddles making it hard to get through with the large flow of traffic from school when it is raining. Puddle takes up most of the area x
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wrotham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian green man never shows, 14th May
item.description:
Pedestrian crossing from Crook Log to central island at traffic lights does not show green man. Traffic direction towards Welling. Crossing only ever feasible by close watching of two roads’ oncoming traffic - Brampton Road and Crook Log traffic. Possibly shows green 1/1000 times.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crook Log, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Dangerous Diseased Tree, 14th May
item.description:
Large, freestanding, ash tree by the path is suffering from Ash die-back and barely alive. Being at the bottom of the slope it is especially tall. Please can this danger be removed before it falls on someone. When cut down, contractors should put the logs in the park log pile (NOT leaving them for older volunteers to move) NOT left in situ.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tetty Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter in Finsbury Market EC2A 2BN, 14th May
item.description:
This area is disgusting and dangerous with discarded glass bottles. You cancelled the previous report stating it is outside your remit. Please don't cancel this without confirming exactly WHO is responsible, and requesting that they tidy up this area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Snowden Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Safety fence, 14th May
item.description:
Broken safety fence - still hangs over pavement corner - despite last year showing as fixed. Traffic lights junction Crook Log and Danson Road DA6
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
